tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Three tests (test_watermark_path_helper_exists, test_get_watermark_helpers_exist, test_object_store_watermark_struct_exists) are purely text-matching tests that read lib.rs and assert on string presence without any code execution. test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests run actual cargo test commands that execute Rust unit tests. The stub implementations (returning Ok(None) or bailing with errors) would cause the Rust tests like test_reader_watermark_roundtrip to fail since they assert on actual watermark data being returned. A stub cannot satisfy these.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution/solve.sh contains a curl command that downloads the fixed file from a specific GitHub commit (92cdfc7fe041bf824567e76995a5d5ef973bc6d6). An agent could read /workspace/sui's solution/solve.sh if it exists in the container, or simply curl the same URL to get the answer. The Dockerfile doesn't remove or protect the solution directory.
